items.statcast_observation: Bobby Witt Jr. produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 110.9 mph at a 8.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Texas Rangers, KC 2, TEX 4. Beck Way led the night, working 2.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 4 strikeouts and 0 walks. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.9 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Rangers Recap
